_note: In NVP/SOAP, CreateRecurringPaymentsProfile created AND activated in one call. REST requires separate activation after buyer approval.

reason.notes: Optional for initial activation. Required only for reactivating suspended/cancelled subscriptions.
Optional for initial activation. Required only for reactivating suspended/cancelled subscriptions.

special_notes.usage: Call after customer approves subscription on PayPal
upgrade_tips: This step has no direct NVP/SOAP equivalent - it was implicit
Must use user_action: CONTINUE in subscription creation to require this step
Subscription status changes: APPROVAL_PENDING → APPROVED → ACTIVE
